Event: The Animated Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 03/07/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: SL60
Steel Piercing Bow Soul

Once in a while, the fighter releases ice arrows at 2 distant enemy fighters. The targets receive deep freeze for 4 s. During this time, the frozen fighters cannot move or attack, and their ability cooldowns increase by 4 s. When the deep freeze effect ends, the targets of the ability explode and take 400000 magical damage, and icicles fly out towards 2 nearest enemy fighters. The icicles deal 450000 magical damage upon impact, increase the cooldown of the targets' equipment and artifact abilities by 3 s., and inflict freezing on them. The attack speed of the frozen fighters is reduced by 40% for 3 s.

Throughout the battle, attacks by the fighter on targets affected by movement restrictions, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, or fear additionally deal 500000 physical damage.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
